crime.value: Murder of Delilah, body disposed of in lake
crime.quote: They lay my body down and start to drag me from there...throws my body in the bone-chilling water.

victim.value: Delilah - popular head cheerleader with seemingly perfect life
victim.quote: She was smart, immensely beautiful, was head cheerleader, and had the perfect life.

closed_world.value: High school community and associated social circle
closed_world.quote: Without Delilah, school almost seemed impossible to get through.

culprit_and_motive.value: Bruce Johnson - motive unclear from excerpt
culprit_and_motive.quote: Bruce Johnson escapes from police custody.

investigator.value: Multiple perspectives including Audrey (best friend) and Logan (boyfriend)
investigator.quote: And then there was me, the true best friend who doesn't know what to do with herself anymore.

suspect_architecture.value: Limited suspect pool in high school social circle: Logan (boyfriend with grief motive), Bruce (captured perpetrator), unnamed killer from prologue who may strike again
suspect_architecture.quote: Her boyfriend Logan won't talk to anyone, won't text anyone back, and he won't even talk to his parents.

red_herring.value: Bruce Johnson's apparent death in Lake Titan - authorities believe he drowned but protagonist knows he's alive and planning next target
red_herring.quote: Detectives were searching for Johnson's body, but all they found were the handcuffs. They believe Johnson to be dead

clue_fairness.value: Reader given same supernatural perspective as Delilah's ghost observing her murder and body disposal, establishing the crime method
clue_fairness.quote: I see myself lying on a floor in a house I don't recognize. Someone grabs my now lifeless body

social_world.value: High school social hierarchy with Delilah as popular head cheerleader, creating dynamics of envy and false friendship among classmates
social_world.quote: She was smart, immensely beautiful, was head cheerleader, and had the perfect life.

alibi.value: Bruce's note claiming he went to the store provides cover story, but Logan's unauthorized entry into empty house creates vulnerability
alibi.quote: Hey mom and dad. I went to the store to get some things. I'll be back soon if you get home before I get back.

media_and_audience.value: Television news coverage of Bruce's escape shapes public perception, reporting false conclusion about his death in Lake Titan
media_and_audience.quote: Bruce Johnson escapes from police custody... They believe Johnson to be dead in Lake Titan

investigator_wound.value: Audrey's grief over losing her true best friend Delilah, contrasted with fake mourners, driving her emotional investment in the case
investigator_wound.quote: And then there was me, the true best friend who doesn't know what to do with herself anymore.
